design_anchor: Primary spec page 6 + practice-establishment guide pages 10-22, 27-34, 52-53 (S2.2 deep read). v0.3 added field-level severity tags + container weights summing to 100 (S2.3, judgment-weighted with primary_spec/guide source anchoring where present). v0.4 adds selective sub-container weights on 4 complex containers (strategic_goals, strategic_alignment, kpi_alignment, focus_areas, sum-to-parent invariant) + evidence_requirements blocks on 102 leaves (S2.4).

containers.weight_rationale_ar: حوكمة الاعتماد ركيزة لإقرار قانونية الوثيقة وتدقيق المسار الإداري. سطح المحتوى مُكثَّف (4 حقول) لكن الأثر الرقابي حادّ — غياب جهة الاعتماد أو الحالة يُسقط الوضع القانوني للوثيقة. وزن 10 يعكس هذه المركزية القانونية رغم ضِيق السطح. (محاور تركيز الحوكمة العامة للممارسة المؤسسية تُعالَج في EA-Operating-Model وفقاً لـ DD-29.)

evidence_requirements.acceptance_criteria_ar: قائمة صريحة لجهات الاعتماد، تتضمن 'لجنة التحول الرقمي / التعاملات الإلكترونية' و'لجنة حوكمة البنية المؤسسية' كحدّ أدنى، في صفحة الاعتماد أو سجل الحوكمة.

validation.rationale_ar: بدون حالة (مسودة/قيد المراجعة/معتمد) لا تُعرف قانونية الوثيقة. حالة استثنائية يرتفع فيها مصدر الحكم إلى must (DD-28).

evidence_requirements.acceptance_criteria_ar: قيمة صريحة لحالة الاعتماد من القائمة المسموح بها (`draft` / `in_review` / `approved` / `rejected`)، مذكورة في صفحة الاعتماد. حالة `approved` تستلزم وجود `approval_date` و `approval_minutes_ref`.

validation.rationale_ar: مهم للحوكمة لكن قد يكون غائباً قبل الاعتماد الفعلي.

evidence_requirements.acceptance_criteria_ar: تاريخ الاعتماد بصيغة محدّدة (يوم/شهر/سنة) في صفحة الاعتماد، يطابق تاريخ المحضر/القرار المُسنِد إن وُجد.

validation.rationale_ar: قوي للمراجعة لكن قد يُستعاض عنه بقرار اعتماد مكتوب.

evidence_requirements.acceptance_criteria_ar: إحالة صريحة إلى محضر اعتماد أو قرار رسمي (رقم المحضر، تاريخه، الجهة المُصدِرة)؛ البديل المقبول: قرار اعتماد مكتوب موقّع من السلطة المُعتِمدة.

containers.weight_rationale_ar: حاوية v0.2 لأثر إشراك أصحاب المصلحة في تشكيل الإستراتيجية. غير مذكورة في ص.6، لكنها سند تدقيقي للمسار التشاركي. وزن 8 يساوي metadata ويعكس كونها معلومة-سياق وليست محتوى استراتيجي، مع الإقرار بقيمتها كأثر ممارسة (DD-13 v0.2 + DD-30 v0.3).
containers.source_quote_ar: إشراك أصحاب المصلحة في تصميم التوجهات الإستراتيجية: عقد ورش عمل/ اجتماعات مع أصحاب المصلحة لمناقشة التحديات الحالية، والتطلعات الإستراتيجية

validation.rationale_ar: الدليل ص.13 يصف الورش/الاجتماعات كأداة تصميم للتوجهات، لا كمخرج وثائقي ملزم في ص.6 (DD-30).
validation.source_quote_ar: إشراك أصحاب المصلحة في تصميم التوجهات الإستراتيجية: عقد ورش عمل/ اجتماعات مع أصحاب المصلحة لمناقشة التحديات الحالية، والتطلعات الإستراتيجية

evidence_requirements.acceptance_criteria_ar: جدول/قسم لورش العمل والاجتماعات المُعقودة لتشكيل التوجهات الإستراتيجية للبنية المؤسسية (≥1 جلسة)، يشكّل سند التتبّع التشاركي.

validation.rationale_ar: معرّف للإحالة من المحاضر.

evidence_requirements.acceptance_criteria_ar: معرّف فريد للجلسة (مثال: `SE-2025-W1`) للإحالة من المحاضر والمخرجات.

validation.rationale_ar: يميّز نوع الجلسة.

evidence_requirements.acceptance_criteria_ar: نوع الجلسة من القائمة المسموح بها (`workshop` / `meeting` / `interview`).

validation.rationale_ar: أساس التتبّع الزمني.

evidence_requirements.acceptance_criteria_ar: تاريخ انعقاد الجلسة بصيغة محدّدة (يوم/شهر/سنة) لتثبيت التتبّع الزمني.

validation.rationale_ar: اسم الميسّر تفصيل إداري لا يحمل جوهر الجلسة.
المشاركون هم جوهر الإدخال — يفقد المعنى بدونهم.
validation.conditional_note_ar: إن سُجّلت جلسة، فقائمة المشاركين ضرورية لاكتمال الإدخال (DD-21).

evidence_requirements.acceptance_criteria_ar: قائمة بأسماء/أدوار أصحاب المصلحة المشاركين فعلياً في الجلسة. (إن سُجّلت جلسة فالقائمة ضرورية لاكتمال الإدخال — DD-21.)

guide_recommended_items_ar: التعريف بالمفاهيم الأساسية لممارسة البنية المؤسسية
تقديم لمحة عامة حول فوائد تبني وتفعيل ممارسة البنية المؤسسية
تقديم ملخص عالي المستوى حول رحلة التبني والتفعيل
تحديد ومناقشة أبرز المتطلبات من الحضور

validation.rationale_ar: الدليل اقترح 4 بنود ضمن guide_recommended_items_ar — يوصى بتغطيتها لاكتمال جدول الأعمال.
validation.source_quote_ar: إشراك أصحاب المصلحة في تصميم التوجهات الإستراتيجية: عقد ورش عمل/ اجتماعات مع أصحاب المصلحة لمناقشة التحديات الحالية، والتطلعات الإستراتيجية

evidence_requirements.acceptance_criteria_ar: بنود جدول الأعمال للجلسة، يوصى بتغطية البنود الـ 4 المُقترَحة في `guide_recommended_items_ar`.

validation.rationale_ar: قيمة الجلسة الفعلية.

evidence_requirements.acceptance_criteria_ar: ملخص نصّي لمخرجات الجلسة (التحديات المُحدَّدة، التطلعات، المتطلبات).

validation.rationale_ar: مرجع إداري؛ قد يُكتفى بـ outcomes_summary_ar.

out_of_scope_v02: dependency edges to upstream (B) and downstream (D/E/F) deliverables
out_of_scope_v03: field-level scoring weights inside containers (top-level container weights only in v0.3)
dependency edges to upstream (B) and downstream (D/E/F) deliverables — deferred to S3
automated scorer implementation — deferred to S4 (v0.3 only declares semantics in DD-16)
out_of_scope_v04: per-item weighting inside list_of_objects arrays (e.g., per-goal weight inside goals[]) — deferred to scorer S4
dependency edges to upstream (B) and downstream (D/E/F) deliverables — deferred to S3
automated scorer implementation — deferred to S4 (v0.3 declares severity semantics; v0.4 declares evidence semantics)
evidence weighting per artifact_type or document_class — deferred to scorer S4 (v0.4 only declares evidence presence/criteria)

decisions.decision: Keep as two separate top-level containers. strategic_goals owns goals→KPIs nesting; kpi_alignment owns cross-strategy KPI linkage matrix.
Three axis types are sufficient: core_capability_axes, supporting_capability_axes, national_indicator_axes.
decisions.v0_2_revision_note: DD-2 revised by DD-11: a fourth axis type (architecture_domain_axes) added in v0.2 based on practice-establishment p.52.

decisions.decision: Keep governance as its own top-level container, not nested under metadata.
All field/container keys use snake_case English; every leaf and container carries name_ar with the original Arabic label.

synthesis_inputs: national-methodology-v1 p.114-143 — checked, content is business architecture implementation, NOT EA-Strategy fields, intentionally skipped

decisions.decision: Add success_factors to identity. Justified by البيت الإستراتيجي (strategic house) on practice-establishment p.13 5.1.2.6 explicitly listing 5 components ending with عوامل النجاح.

The 3 stated غايات (purposes) of EA strategy definition belong in metadata (not identity) as document_purpose_statement, since they describe why-the-document-exists rather than the entity's strategic content.
decisions.user_choice: Gate 1 — chose metadata over identity over reject

decisions.decision: current_state_assessment is a structured object with document_review + stakeholder_meetings + swot_analysis. Each sub-task has its own evidence quote from p.11.
Practice-establishment p.12 explicitly marks دراسة المقارنة المعيارية as اختيارية. Schema preserves this with optional_per_guide: true and study_status enum allowing 'not_conducted'.
decisions.v0_3_revision_note: DD-8 revised by DD-18 (v0.3): the optional_per_guide:true flag is deprecated and migrated into the validation block (severity=nice, severity_source=guide). Single source of truth per field.

decisions.decision: strategic_direction_analysis is a preparatory step (input documents review) that feeds the alignment work. Not merged into strategic_alignment because the latter holds the final intersection matrix; the former holds the analysis trail.
framework_issuer is an enum starting with DGA + NCA + NDMO (per user input on KSA quasi-regulatory bodies). Marked extensible: true with a note for future additions.
decisions.user_input: Gate 3 — user noted: هيئة الأمن السيبراني ومكتب إدارة البيانات الوطني بالإضافة إلى هيئة الحكومة الرقمية

decisions.topic: architecture_domain_axes added as 4th sub-container in focus_areas
decisions.decision: The 6 NORA architecture domains (business/experience/applications/data/technical/security) are an orthogonal focus dimension to capability/national-indicator axes. Domain enum + Arabic value_map preserves bilingual integrity.

The 4 axes from p.33 5.5.3.2 (strategic_alignment_and_change, risk_management, expenditure_management, conflict_and_escalation) are encoded as enum + value_map. Each can be assigned to a responsible_committee.
decisions.v0_3_revision_note: DD-12 REVERSED by DD-29 (v0.3): governance_focus_axes removed from EA-Strategy. Fresh re-reading of practice-establishment p.33 §5.5.3.2 shows the 4 axes cover the WHOLE EA practice operationally (strategic + compliance + technical change management + enterprise modeling), not the strategy doc specifically. Migrated to EA-Operating-Model.

decisions.decision: Despite being process-evidence rather than strategic content, stakeholder workshops are explicit in p.13 5.1.2.6 with a recommended agenda. Promoting to its own container keeps governance focused on approval and preserves audit trail of who shaped the strategy.
decisions.user_choice: Gate 6 — chose 'new container' over 'merge into governance' over 'reject'

decisions.decision: 5 candidates explicitly rejected as out-of-scope for EA-Strategy document; documented here for audit trail.

rejected.rationale: Reference to a derived view (Figure 5). The components (vision/mission/pillars/goals/success_factors) are already individual fields in identity; the diagram is a presentation artifact, not data.
Out of scope — belongs to EA-Roadmap (DEL-DOC-005) or Gap Analysis report (DEL-RPT). EA-Strategy declares direction; gap analysis evaluates current vs target.
Out of scope — describes services delivered by the EA practice itself (what the EA unit produces). Belongs to EA-Operating-Model deliverable.

Out of scope per user decision (Gate 5) — placement model (Strategy-focused vs IT-focused) and sponsor role belong to EA-Operating-Model. Governance container in EA-Strategy stays focused on approval flow.
Out of scope — operational procedure that belongs to a dedicated EA-Maturity-Assessment deliverable. Medium confidence in source text also weakened the case.

decisions.decision: Subagent found no justified additions in the read ranges. National-methodology p.114-143 (chapter on initiative evaluation) referenced KPIs but only in OPEX/CAPEX initiative-prioritization context, not in cross-strategy KPI alignment. Re-evaluate when D-phase deliverable schemas surface KPI-related dependencies.
decisions.v0_4_note: Still holds in v0.4 — no new fields added. v0.4 added sub-weights (DD-39) + evidence_requirements only; no content changes.

synthesis_inputs: Primary-spec p.6 verified — only 3 columns (اسم الوثيقة | محتوى الوثيقة | مستوى الاعتماد). No severity column for EA-Strategy. The 'الزامية / اختيارية' language exists but only for Building Blocks classification on p.8 (وثيقة النموذج العام للمكونات), not EA-Strategy. Implication: severity tagging dominated by judgment + guide modal verbs already embedded in v0.2 source quotes.
Existing v0.1 + v0.2 source_quote_ar fields (already embed modal verbs like 'من الممكن' for swot_analysis and 'خطوة اختيارية' for benchmark_study)
Consultant judgment for fields lacking direct source-text severity signal (KSA EA practice + audit risk)
DD-12 (v0.2) reversed via fresh re-reading of practice-establishment p.33 §5.5.3.2 — see DD-29

approved_question_set.rule_source: hybrid: spec + judgment (re-read of guides for modal verbs not needed; existing v0.2 quotes already capture the signals)

decisions.decision: must = full container weight loss if absent; should = 50% partial credit possible; nice = 0 penalty for absence + bonus credit for presence. v0.3 declares these semantics; scorer implementation deferred to S4.

Container weights are integers summing to exactly 100 across all 8 top-level containers. Basis: consultant judgment about audit risk per container, anchored on primary_spec emphasis (e.g., strategic_goals=22 weights bullet 1's 'goals/KPIs' as the largest content surface). Sub-container weighting deferred.
decisions.v0_4_note: Container-level weights unchanged in v0.4. Sub-container weights added on 4 complex containers (DD-37/38/39/40) summing to their parents (sum-to-parent invariant).

decisions.decision: The v0.2 inline flag optional_per_guide:true (used on benchmark_study) is deprecated in v0.3. Migrated into the new validation block as severity=nice, severity_source=guide, reusing the existing source_quote_ar. Single source of truth per field.
metadata.language tagged should not must — disclosure-only field, doesn't hold strategic content; absence shouldn't fail the doc.

decisions.topic: asymmetric severity for success_factors vs vision/mission/pillars/values
decisions.decision: vision/mission/pillars/values are must (primary_spec) because they are listed explicitly on p.6 bullet 1. success_factors is should (guide) because it appears only in البيت الإستراتيجي per guide §5.1.2.6 — primary_spec defines the regulator-citable must floor; guide-only items don't transit to must.
decisions.implication: A doc missing success_factors is not non-compliant against primary_spec, but is incomplete against best-practice (guide). Partial scoring penalty, not total.

decisions.topic: conditional-must pattern for leaves inside optional/should containers
decisions.decision: When a parent (e.g., swot_analysis=nice, benchmark_study=nice) is optional, leaves inherit the parent severity tag. To capture 'if-conducted-then-required' semantics, leaves carry a conditional_note_ar narrative attribute. Hard conditional logic (parent=conducted → leaf=required) deferred to scorer (S4); schema stays flat.
decisions.v0_4_extension: DD-34 extends conditional inheritance to evidence_requirements: nice + conditional_note_ar leaves carry evidence blocks with parallel conditional notes (scorer activates evidence check only when condition holds).

decisions.decision: strategic_direction_analysis is the analytical input to strategic_alignment.intersections_*. The intersections themselves are must (primary_spec bullet 2), but the upstream input analysis is should (guide §5.1.2.4) — primary_spec must floor does not transit upstream to inputs.

kpis[] is must (primary_spec), but its leaves get explicit by-leaf severities: kpi_id=must, title_ar=must, target=must (KPI without target is not a KPI), measurement_unit=should (often inferable), baseline=should (may defer to first measurement). No uniform parent-inheritance for KPI leaves.
decisions.rationale: Different leaves carry different audit weight; uniform inheritance would over- or under-claim severity.

decisions.decision: Tagged should/guide because the content is from guide §5.1.2.5, not primary-spec p.6 bullet 2 (which names 3 specific intersection types). Promoting to must would over-claim severity beyond primary_spec; the field also overlaps in scope with intersections_with_related_digital_strategies (already must), which softens the audit gap.

alignment_with_national_frameworks[].framework_version is nice (judgment) — many national frameworks are versionless or evolving in practice; absence shouldn't degrade alignment quality. First explicit case where a leaf is more permissive than its parent.

decisions.topic: architecture_domain_axes=should despite encoding the 6 NORA domains
decisions.decision: Tagged should/guide — primary-spec p.6 doesn't mandate per-domain focus declaration; the v0.2 addition encodes a depth layer from guide procedures 10-15. Parallel to DD-24 (national_frameworks).

architecture_domain_axes[].domain_name_ar is fully derivable from the domain enum via value_map. Tagging as nice establishes the principle: when a leaf is fully determined by another leaf via a deterministic mapping, recording is convenience (human-readable artifacts) not information-bearing. Reusable for any 'derivable_name_ar' pattern across the schema family.
decisions.v0_4_extension: DD-33 + DD-36 codify that derivable nice leaves skip evidence_requirements (no evidence anchoring needed when the leaf carries no information beyond its source).

decisions.decision: First case where a judgment-anchored field rises to must severity. Rationale: governance.approval_status absence breaks the doc's legal state (no answer to 'is this draft or approved?'). Sets precedent: judgment-source can support must when absence makes the parent meaningless.

decisions.topic: governance_focus_axes removed from EA-Strategy (revises DD-12 v0.2)
decisions.decision: v0.2 DD-12 had accepted governance_focus_axes (4 axes from practice-establishment p.33 §5.5.3.2) into EA-Strategy scope. Fresh re-reading shows the 4 axes cover the WHOLE EA practice operationally (strategic + compliance + technical change management + enterprise modeling), not the strategy doc specifically. Removed from EA-Strategy; migrates to EA-Operating-Model when that schema is built.
decisions.user_quote_ar: محاور تركيز حوكمة البنية المؤسسية لا تتعلق باستراتيجية البنية المؤسسية، إنما تهدف إلى تغطية جميع المهام المرتبطة بالممارسة من جهة ومن جهة أخرى تضمن تفعيل دور الممارسة على جميع المستويات في الجهة بما تقضيه متطلبات العمل بدايةً من الجانب الاستراتيجي والامتثال للضوابط والمعايير الوطنية ذات الصلة وحتى إدارة التغييرات التقنية ونمذجة العمل المؤسسي لممارسة البنية المؤسسية
removed_fields: governance.governance_focus_axes (entire sub-container with axis enum + value_map + responsible_committee + scope_description_ar)

decisions.decision: stakeholder_engagement and all its leaves stay at should/nice (no must) — process-evidence rather than strategic content. primary-spec floor doesn't apply here. DD-13 (v0.2) accepted the container into EA-Strategy scope for audit trail of strategy formation; DD-30 confirms it stays at should and does not elevate to must.

synthesis_inputs: Schema-gate-loop skill workflow (8 gates + finalization, battle-tested S2.2/S2.3, promoted to skill 2026-05-01 commit 333ba6c)
Primary-spec p.6 + practice-establishment guide (no fresh source-text reading required for v0.4 — depth additions only)
verify_schema.py v0.4 sub-weight check (lines 151-164) activates automatically when schema_version >= '0.4'
Container map produced by Explore subagent at start of S2.4: 4 of 8 containers identified as complex enough for sub-weighting

approved_question_set.evidence_coverage: must + should require evidence; nice + conditional_note_ar gets conditional evidence; nice without conditional skipped
approved_question_set.sub_weight_scope: selective on 4 complex containers (strategic_goals, strategic_alignment, kpi_alignment, focus_areas); flat-leaf containers skipped

decisions.decision: v0.4 adds sub-container weights selectively — only on containers whose direct children form arrays of typed records (list_of_objects) or distinct sub-objects. Flat-leaf containers (metadata, identity, governance, stakeholder_engagement) keep container-level weight only. Sum-to-parent invariant: sum of sub-weights inside a container equals its parent weight. Enforced by scripts/verify_schema.py lines 151-164.
decisions.rationale_ar: تطبيق sub-weights على flat containers يولّد نقاطاً عددية مساوية للأب — ضوضاء بلا قيمة. selective application يحافظ على الإشارة. الـ 4 containers complex التي حصلت على sub-weights في EA-Strategy: strategic_goals, strategic_alignment, kpi_alignment, focus_areas.

decisions.decision: evidence_requirements block lives sibling to validation block on the leaf (not nested inside it). Shape: { artifact_type: enum (pdf|docx|json|table|narrative_section), document_class: enum (minute|resolution|report|chart|excel|strategy_section|other), acceptance_criteria_ar: text, source_authority_ar?: text, notes_ar?: text, conditional_note_ar?: text }. Enums are extensible per the DD-10 pattern.
decisions.rationale_ar: Sibling placement يفصل concerns: validation يحتفظ بـ severity + source؛ evidence يحتفظ بـ acceptance criteria. كلاهما يتطوّر باستقلالية في sprints لاحقة.

decisions.decision: evidence_requirements is required for leaves with severity=must or should. Optional for severity=nice. Only nice + conditional_note_ar (DD-21 family) carries evidence_requirements (with conditional inheritance per DD-34). Nice without conditional is skipped to reduce noise.
decisions.rationale_ar: متّسق مع DD-16 (severity semantics): nice = 0 penalty + bonus for presence. فرض evidence على nice يخالف صفة الاختيارية. السكورر (S4) سيحترم هذا بأن يفعّل evidence checks فقط لـ leaves ذات evidence_requirements block.

decisions.decision: Leaves with severity=nice + conditional_note_ar (DD-21 conditional-must pattern) carry evidence_requirements with a parallel conditional_note_ar inside the evidence block. Scorer (S4) activates the evidence check only when the condition is met (e.g., parent=recorded). Schema stays flat; conditional logic deferred to scorer.
decisions.rationale_ar: تماشياً مع DD-21 conditional-must pattern. القائمة conditional في v0.4 تشمل: SWOT 4 quadrants (إذا أُجري SWOT)، benchmark_study 4 leaves (إذا study_status ≠ not_conducted).

decisions.decision: out_of_scope_v04 captures 4 remaining deferrals: per-item weighting inside arrays (S4), dependency edges (S3), automated scorer impl (S4), evidence weighting per artifact_type/document_class (S4). The two v0.3 deferrals that v0.4 closed (sub-container weights + evidence_requirements) are removed from the active deferral list.
decisions.rationale_ar: تثبيت formal لما يظل خارج scope v0.4 لتجنّب scope creep في sprints لاحقة.

decisions.decision: Object wrappers (type='object' with item_fields, no scalar content of their own) skip evidence_requirements; evidence flows to text-bearing leaves only. List_of_objects parents (type='list_of_objects') receive evidence_requirements at the list level describing presence + cardinality + integrity; item-level scalar leaves carry their own evidence for content match. Schema marker on skipped wrappers: 'evidence_skipped_per_dd_36' (audit trail attribute, optional).
decisions.rationale_ar: Object wrappers تحمل ميتاديتا (severity + source) لكن لا content؛ تكرار evidence على wrapper + children يُنتج noise. List_of_objects parents تحمل دلالة كل-القائمة (cardinality, completeness) التي لا تنوب عنها item-level evidence — معلومتان مختلفتان.
examples_in_v0_4: List parents with list-level evidence: strategic_goals.goals, strategic_goals.goals[].kpis, strategic_goals.strategic_direction_analysis.current_strategic_projects, all 4 in strategic_alignment, all 3 in kpi_alignment, all 4 in focus_areas, stakeholder_engagement.workshops_and_meetings

decisions.decision: Sub-weights inside strategic_goals (parent=22): current_state_assessment=3, benchmark_study=1, strategic_direction_analysis=3, goals=15. Sum=22.
decisions.applies_to: this deliverable (template for similar structure-rich containers)
decisions.rationale_ar: goals + nested kpis = primary_spec floor للحاوية (ص.6 bullet 1). التحليلات التمهيدية (current_state_assessment + strategic_direction_analysis) عند 3 لكلٍّ منهما (guide-anchored). benchmark_study عند 1 (اختيارية صراحةً، DD-18).

decisions.decision: Sub-weights inside strategic_alignment (parent=14): intersections_with_business_strategy=4, intersections_with_digital_transformation_strategy=4, intersections_with_related_digital_strategies=4, alignment_with_national_frameworks=2. Sum=14.
decisions.rationale_ar: الـ 3 primary_spec arrays متساوية (مذكورة بنفس الترتيب والثقل في ص.6 bullet 2). الرابع (national_frameworks) عند 2 لأنه should/guide v0.2 (سقف DD-24).

decisions.decision: Sub-weights inside kpi_alignment (parent=10): linkage_to_business_kpis=4, linkage_to_digital_transformation_kpis=3, linkage_to_other_digital_strategy_kpis=3. Sum=10.
decisions.rationale_ar: 10÷3 لا يقسم بالتساوي. منح 'الأعمال' 4 (الأكثر مذكوراً أولاً في ص.6 bullet 3 وأصل اشتقاق الجبهتين الأخريين). الجبهتان التاليتان متساويتان عند 3.

decisions.decision: Sub-weights inside focus_areas (parent=14): core_capability_axes=4, supporting_capability_axes=4, national_indicator_axes=4, architecture_domain_axes=2. Sum=14.
decisions.rationale_ar: الـ 3 primary_spec arrays متساوية (bullets 4-5 من ص.6). architecture_domain_axes عند 2 (سقف DD-26 لـ guide v0.2).
